import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';

// ── Icons inline (no import needed) ──────────────────────────────────────────
const Icon = ({ d, size = 16, color = 'currentColor', fill = 'none', strokeWidth = 2 }) => (
  <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill={fill} stroke={color} strokeWidth={strokeWidth} strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
    {Array.isArray(d) ? d.map((path, i) => <path key={i} d={path} />) : <path d={d} />}
  </svg>
);

// ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const uid = () => Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 9);
const clamp = (v, min, max) => Math.min(Math.max(v, min), max);

// ── Data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const PRODUCTS = [
  { id: 'tshirt',   label: 'T-Shirt',   price: 10000, sizes: ['XS','S','M','L','XL','2XL'], emoji: '👕' },
  { id: 'hoodie',   label: 'Hoodie',    price: 18000, sizes: ['S','M','L','XL','2XL'], emoji: '🧥' },
  { id: 'sweat',    label: 'Sweat',     price: 15000, sizes: ['S','M','L','XL','2XL'], emoji: '🩱' },
  { id: 'jogger',   label: 'Jogger',    price: 16000, sizes: ['S','M','L','XL','2XL'], emoji: '👖' },
  { id: 'short',    label: 'Short',     price: 12000, sizes: ['S','M','L','XL'], emoji: '🩳' },
  { id: 'veste',    label: 'Veste',     price: 22000, sizes: ['S','M','L','XL','2XL'], emoji: '🥼' },
  { id: 'mug',      label: 'Mug',       price: 8000,  sizes: ['Standard','Grande'], emoji: '☕' },
  { id: 'casquette',label: 'Casquette', price: 7000,  sizes: ['Unique'], emoji: '🧢' },
];

const COLORS = [
  { hex: '#F5F5F0', name: 'Blanc cassé' }, { hex: '#1A1A1A', name: 'Noir profond' },
  { hex: '#2B4FD9', name: 'Bleu nuit' },   { hex: '#C92828', name: 'Rouge passion' },
  { hex: '#1A6B3C', name: 'Vert forêt' },  { hex: '#D97706', name: 'Ambre' },
  { hex: '#6D28D9', name: 'Violet' },       { hex: '#DB2777', name: 'Rose' },
  { hex: '#0E7490', name: 'Sarcelle' },     { hex: '#78350F', name: 'Café' },
  { hex: '#374151', name: 'Gris foncé' },   { hex: '#FBBF24', name: 'Or' },
  { hex: '#10B981', name: 'Émeraude' },     { hex: '#F97316', name: 'Orange' },
  { hex: '#EC4899', name: 'Fuchsia' },      { hex: '#84CC16', name: 'Citron' },
];

const FONTS = [
  'Bebas Neue', 'Impact', 'Playfair Display', 'Georgia',
  'Courier New', 'Arial Black', 'Trebuchet MS', 'Verdana',
];

const TEXT_COLORS = [
  '#FFFFFF','#000000','#2B4FD9','#C92828','#1A6B3C','#D97706',
  '#6D28D9','#DB2777','#0E7490','#FBBF24','#374151','#F97316',
];

// ── Asset Library ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const LIBRARY = {
  formes: [
    { id:'rect',     label:'Rectangle', free:true,  render: (c) => `<rect x="5" y="15" width="90" height="70" rx="6" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'circle',   label:'Cercle',    free:true,  render: (c) => `<circle cx="50" cy="50" r="44" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'triangle', label:'Triangle',  free:true,  render: (c) => `<polygon points="50,5 95,95 5,95" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'star',     label:'Étoile',    free:true,  render: (c) => `<polygon points="50,5 61,35 95,35 68,57 79,91 50,70 21,91 32,57 5,35 39,35" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'heart',    label:'Cœur',      free:true,  render: (c) => `<path d="M50,85 C20,55 5,30 20,15 C32,5 45,12 50,22 C55,12 68,5 80,15 C95,30 80,55 50,85Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'diamond',  label:'Diamant',   free:true,  render: (c) => `<polygon points="50,5 95,50 50,95 5,50" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'hexagon',  label:'Hexagone',  free:false, render: (c) => `<polygon points="50,5 90,27 90,73 50,95 10,73 10,27" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'arrow',    label:'Flèche',    free:true,  render: (c) => `<path d="M10,40 L60,40 L60,20 L90,50 L60,80 L60,60 L10,60Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'cross',    label:'Croix',     free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M35,5 L65,5 L65,35 L95,35 L95,65 L65,65 L65,95 L35,95 L35,65 L5,65 L5,35 L35,35Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'ring',     label:'Anneau',    free:true,  render: (c) => `<circle cx="50" cy="50" r="44" fill="${c}"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="28" fill="white"/>` },
    { id:'drop',     label:'Goutte',    free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M50,5 C50,5 15,40 15,62 C15,80 31,95 50,95 C69,95 85,80 85,62 C85,40 50,5 50,5Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'moon',     label:'Lune',      free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M50,5 A40,40 0 1,0 50,95 A25,25 0 1,1 50,5Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
  ],
  streetwear: [
    { id:'lightning',label:'Éclair',   free:true,  render: (c) => `<polygon points="62,5 30,55 52,55 38,95 72,45 50,45" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'crown',    label:'Couronne', free:true,  render: (c) => `<path d="M8,72 L18,28 L38,55 L50,8 L62,55 L82,28 L92,72Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'flame',    label:'Flamme',   free:true,  render: (c) => `<path d="M50,95 C20,90 8,65 22,48 C13,52 10,38 19,28 C24,38 29,35 26,22 C39,33 37,48 44,43 C38,33 46,18 55,8 C53,28 63,33 60,48 C68,38 70,53 63,58 C78,43 76,73 50,95Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'infinity', label:'Infini',   free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M18,50 C18,34 28,22 40,22 C52,22 57,34 62,50 C67,66 72,78 84,78 C94,78 94,66 84,50 C94,50 94,22 84,22 C72,22 67,34 62,50 C57,66 52,78 40,78 C28,78 18,66 18,50Z" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="9"/>` },
    { id:'wave',     label:'Vague',    free:true,  render: (c) => `<path d="M3,50 C13,28 23,28 33,50 C43,72 53,72 63,50 C73,28 83,28 93,50" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="9" stroke-linecap="round"/>` },
    { id:'eye',      label:'Œil',      free:false, render: (c) => `<ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="44" ry="26" fill="${c}"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="14" fill="white"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="8" fill="${c}" opacity="0.85"/>` },
    { id:'skull',    label:'Skull',    free:false, render: (c) => `<ellipse cx="50" cy="38" rx="32" ry="32" fill="${c}"/><rect x="28" y="62" width="44" height="20" rx="4" fill="${c}"/><circle cx="38" cy="38" r="9" fill="white" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="62" cy="38" r="9" fill="white" opacity="0.8"/><rect x="36" y="68" width="8" height="14" rx="2" fill="white" opacity="0.6"/><rect x="46" y="68" width="8" height="14" rx="2" fill="white" opacity="0.6"/><rect x="56" y="68" width="8" height="14" rx="2" fill="white" opacity="0.6"/>` },
    { id:'dragon',   label:'Dragon',   free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M50,10 C38,10 28,18 26,30 C18,28 8,35 10,48 C5,50 2,57 8,62 C6,70 12,76 20,74 C24,82 34,86 42,82 C44,86 50,90 58,86 C66,90 76,82 78,74 C86,76 92,70 90,62 C96,57 93,50 88,48 C90,35 80,28 72,30 C70,18 62,10 50,10Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'badge',    label:'Badge',    free:true,  render: (c) => `<polygon points="50,5 61,35 95,35 68,58 79,92 50,72 21,92 32,58 5,35 39,35" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'drip',     label:'Drip',     free:false, render: (c) => `<rect x="14" y="5" width="72" height="55" rx="7" fill="${c}"/><path d="M28,57 C28,57 22,77 26,88 C29,93 34,90 34,82 L34,57Z" fill="${c}"/><path d="M49,57 C49,57 47,82 49,90 C51,95 54,91 54,81 L54,57Z" fill="${c}"/><path d="M68,57 C68,57 65,72 67,80 C69,85 72,83 72,75 L72,57Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'splash',   label:'Splash',   free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M50,12 C62,6 78,16 82,10 C87,26 98,20 93,36 C103,42 97,58 87,54 C93,68 82,78 72,70 C70,83 56,88 50,77 C44,88 30,83 28,70 C18,78 7,68 13,54 C3,58 -3,42 7,36 C2,20 13,26 18,10 C22,16 38,6 50,12Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
  ],
  illustrations: [
    { id:'africa',   label:'Afrique',  free:true,  render: (c) => `<path d="M48,5 C40,5 32,8 28,14 C22,14 16,18 16,25 C10,27 8,33 10,39 C8,43 8,50 12,54 C12,60 14,66 18,70 C20,76 22,82 26,86 C30,92 36,96 42,96 C48,100 56,98 60,94 C66,90 70,84 72,78 C76,74 78,68 78,62 C82,56 82,48 78,42 C80,36 76,30 70,28 C70,22 66,16 60,14 C58,8 54,5 48,5Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'sun',      label:'Soleil',   free:true,  render: (c) => `<circle cx="50" cy="50" r="20" fill="${c}"/>${[0,45,90,135,180,225,270,315].map(a=>`<line x1="${50+22*Math.cos(a*Math.PI/180)}" y1="${50+22*Math.sin(a*Math.PI/180)}" x2="${50+40*Math.cos(a*Math.PI/180)}" y2="${50+40*Math.sin(a*Math.PI/180)}" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>`).join('')}` },
    { id:'mountain', label:'Montagne', free:false, render: (c) => `<polygon points="50,5 95,95 5,95" fill="${c}"/><polygon points="50,5 70,40 30,40" fill="white" opacity="0.3"/>` },
    { id:'wave2',    label:'Vague JP', free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M5,40 C15,25 25,55 35,35 C45,15 55,50 65,30 C75,10 85,45 95,35 L95,80 C85,65 75,85 65,70 C55,55 45,80 35,65 C25,50 15,70 5,60Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'leaf',     label:'Feuille',  free:true,  render: (c) => `<path d="M50,95 C50,95 10,60 10,30 C10,14 28,5 50,10 C72,5 90,14 90,30 C90,60 50,95 50,95Z" fill="${c}"/>` },
    { id:'crystal',  label:'Cristal',  free:false, render: (c) => `<polygon points="50,5 75,25 85,55 70,85 30,85 15,55 25,25" fill="${c}" opacity="0.9"/><polygon points="50,5 75,25 50,35" fill="white" opacity="0.3"/><polygon points="50,5 25,25 50,35" fill="white" opacity="0.15"/>` },
    { id:'compass',  label:'Boussole', free:false, render: (c) => `<circle cx="50" cy="50" r="44" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="5"/><polygon points="50,12 56,50 50,44 44,50" fill="${c}"/><polygon points="50,88 44,50 50,56 56,50" fill="${c}" opacity="0.4"/>` },
    { id:'feather',  label:'Plume',    free:false, render: (c) => `<path d="M50,90 C50,90 20,60 20,35 C20,18 34,8 50,8 L50,90Z" fill="${c}"/><path d="M50,90 C50,90 80,60 80,35 C80,18 66,8 50,8 L50,90Z" fill="${c}" opacity="0.6"/><line x1="50" y1="8" x2="50" y2="90" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="2.5"/>` },
  ],
  stickers: [
    { id:'s1', label:'🔥', emoji:'🔥', free:true  },
    { id:'s2', label:'⭐', emoji:'⭐', free:true  },
    { id:'s3', label:'⚡', emoji:'⚡', free:true  },
    { id:'s4', label:'💀', emoji:'💀', free:false },
    { id:'s5', label:'👑', emoji:'👑', free:false },
    { id:'s6', label:'☮️', emoji:'☮️', free:true  },
    { id:'s7', label:'👁️', emoji:'👁️', free:false },
    { id:'s8', label:'🌹', emoji:'🌹', free:true  },
    { id:'s9', label:'☯️', emoji:'☯️', free:false },
    { id:'s10',label:'👽', emoji:'👽', free:false },
    { id:'s11',label:'💎', emoji:'💎', free:false },
    { id:'s12',label:'⚔️', emoji:'⚔️', free:false },
    { id:'s13',label:'🐉', emoji:'🐉', free:false },
    { id:'s14',label:'🌸', emoji:'🌸', free:true  },
    { id:'s15',label:'🐺', emoji:'🐺', free:false },
    { id:'s16',label:'✊', emoji:'✊', free:true  },
    { id:'s17',label:'🦋', emoji:'🦋', free:true  },
    { id:'s18',label:'🎯', emoji:'🎯', free:true  },
    { id:'s19',label:'🌊', emoji:'🌊', free:true  },
    { id:'s20',label:'🎪', emoji:'🎪', free:false },
  ],
};

// ── 3D Mockups SVG ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Each mockup uses advanced SVG with lighting, gradients, shadows for 3D feel

const Mockup3D = ({ productId, color, children, rotation3d = 0 }) => {
  const isDark = parseInt(color.replace('#',''), 16) < 0x888888;
  const highlight = isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.35)';
  const shadow = isDark ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
  const fold = isDark ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.12)';

  const tshirt = (
    <svg viewBox="0 0 380 420" style={{ width:'100%', height:'100%', filter: `drop-shadow(0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)) drop-shadow(0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2))`, transform: `perspective(900px) rotateY(${rotation3d}deg)`, transition: 'transform 0.05s linear' }}>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="body_grad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor={highlight}/>
          <stop offset="45%" stopColor="transparent"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={shadow}/>
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="left_sleeve" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor={shadow}/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="transparent"/>
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="right_sleeve" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="transparent"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={shadow}/>
        </linearGradient>
        <filter id="fab_texture">
          <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.65" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
          <feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0" in="noise" result="gray"/>
          <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="gray" mode="multiply" result="blend"/>
          <feComposite in="blend" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in"/>
        </filter>
        <filter id="inner_shadow">
          <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" in="SourceAlpha" result="blur"/>
          <feOffset dx="2" dy="4" result="offset"/>
          <feComposite in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in" result="comp"/>
          <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="comp" mode="normal"/>
        </filter>
      </defs>
      {/* Body */}
      <path d="M95,80 L38,108 L28,165 L70,150 L70,375 L310,375 L310,150 L352,165 L342,108 L285,80 L256,52 C242,72 216,85 190,85 C164,85 138,72 124,52 Z" fill={color}/>
      {/* Fabric texture overlay */}
      <path d="M95,80 L38,108 L28,165 L70,150 L70,375 L310,375 L310,150 L352,165 L342,108 L285,80 L256,52 C242,72 216,85 190,85 C164,85 138,72 124,52 Z" fill="url(#body_grad)" opacity="0.85"/>
      {/* Left sleeve fold */}
      <path d="M38,108 L28,165 L70,150 L95,80 Z" fill="url(#left_sleeve)"/>
      {/* Right sleeve fold */}
      <path d="M342,108 L352,165 L310,150 L285,80 Z" fill="url(#right_sleeve)"/>
      {/* Center fold crease */}
      <path d="M190,85 L190,375" stroke={fold} strokeWidth="2.5" strokeDasharray="none" opacity="0.6"/>
      {/* Collar detail */}
      <path d="M124,52 C138,72 164,85 190,85 C216,85 242,72 256,52" fill="none" stroke={isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'} strokeWidth="3"/>
      {/* Hemline crease */}
      <path d="M70,370 L310,370" stroke={fold} strokeWidth="2" opacity="0.5"/>
      {/* Side seams */}
      <path d="M70,150 L70,375" stroke={fold} strokeWidth="2" opacity="0.5"/>
      <path d="M310,150 L310,375" stroke={fold} strokeWidth="2" opacity="0.5"/>
      {/* Collar rib */}
      <path d="M128,55 C140,70 163,82 190,82 C217,82 240,70 252,55" fill="none" stroke={isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.07)'} strokeWidth="5" strokeLinecap="round"/>
      {/* Shine streak */}
      <path d="M105,90 L105,300" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" strokeWidth="18" strokeLinecap="round"/>
    </svg>
  );

  const hoodie = (
    <svg viewBox="0 0 390 440" style={{ width:'100%', height:'100%', filter: `drop-shadow(0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)) drop-shadow(0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2))`, transform: `perspective(900px) rotateY(${rotation3d}deg)`, transition: 'transform 0.05s linear' }}>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="h_body" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor={highlight}/>
          <stop offset="50%" stopColor="transparent"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={shadow}/>
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="h_hood" x1="0%" y1="100%" x2="50%" y2="0%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="transparent"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={shadow}/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      {/* Hood */}
      <path d="M112,48 C106,28 110,10 124,6 C140,2 162,12 190,12 C218,12 240,2 256,6 C270,10 274,28 268,48 C254,30 224,20 190,20 C156,20 126,30 112,48Z" fill={color}/>
      <path d="M112,48 C106,28 110,10 124,6 C140,2 162,12 190,12 C218,12 240,2 256,6 C270,10 274,28 268,48 C254,30 224,20 190,20 C156,20 126,30 112,48Z" fill="url(#h_hood)"/>
      {/* Body */}
      <path d="M88,100 L30,130 L22,195 L68,175 L68,390 L312,390 L312,175 L358,195 L350,130 L292,100 L268,48 C254,68 224,82 190,82 C156,82 126,68 112,48 Z" fill={color}/>
      <path d="M88,100 L30,130 L22,195 L68,175 L68,390 L312,390 L312,175 L358,195 L350,130 L292,100 L268,48 C254,68 224,82 190,82 C156,82 126,68 112,48 Z" fill="url(#h_body)" opacity="0.8"/>
      {/* Center zip/seam */}
      <path d="M190,82 L190,390" stroke={fold} strokeWidth="3" opacity="0.5"/>
      {/* Kangaroo pocket */}
      <path d="M128,270 C128,258 138,252 190,252 C242,252 252,258 252,270 L252,330 C252,338 242,343 190,343 C138,343 128,338 128,330 Z" fill={isDark?'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'}/>
      <path d="M128,270 L252,270" stroke={fold} strokeWidth="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>
      {/* Drawstring */}
      <circle cx="180" cy="96" r="5" fill={isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'}/>
      <circle cx="200" cy="96" r="5" fill={isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'}/>
      <path d="M175,100 L162,120" stroke={isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.15)'} strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round"/>
      <path d="M205,100 L218,120" stroke={isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.15)'} strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round"/>
      {/* Shine */}
      <path d="M98,105 L98,340" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" strokeWidth="22" strokeLinecap="round"/>
    </svg>
  );

  const jogger = (
    <svg viewBox="0 0 340 480" style={{ width:'100%', height:'100%', filter: `drop-shadow(0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35))`, transform: `perspective(900px) rotateY(${rotation3d}deg)`, transition: 'transform 0.05s linear' }}>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="j_grad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor={highlight}/>
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor={shadow}/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      {/* Waistband */}
      <rect x="60" y="18" width="220" height="35" rx="8" fill={color}/>
      <rect x="60" y="18" width="220" height="35" rx="8" fill={fold} opacity="0.3"/>
      {/* Left leg */}
      <path d="M60,52 L60,340 C60,365 70,390 80,420 L130,420 L148,340 L148,52Z" fill={color}/>
      <path d="M60,52 L60,340 C60,365 70,390 80,420 L130,420 L148,340 L148,52Z" fill="url(#j_grad)" opacity="0.6"/>
      {/* Right leg */}
      <path d="M280,52 L280,340 C280,365 270,390 260,420 L210,420 L192,340 L192,52Z" fill={color}/>
      <path d="M280,52 L280,340 C280,365 270,390 260,420 L210,420 L192,340 L192,52Z" fill="url(#j_grad)" opacity="0.4"/>
      {/* Crotch */}
      <path d="M148,52 L148,200 C148,220 160,232 170,232 C180,232 192,220 192,200 L192,52Z" fill={color}/>
      {/* Cuff left */}
      <rect x="72" y="408" width="72" height="22" rx="6" fill={color}/>
      <rect x="72" y="408" width="72" height="22" rx="6" fill={fold} opacity="0.25"/>
      {/* Cuff right */}
      <rect x="196" y="408" width="72" height="22" rx="6" fill={color}/>
      <rect x="196" y="408" width="72" height="22" rx="6" fill={fold} opacity="0.25"/>
      {/* Seam */}
      <path d="M170,232 L170,420" stroke={fold} strokeWidth="2.5" opacity="0.4"/>
      {/* Drawstring */}

// ── Design Canvas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function DesignCanvas({ elements, selectedId, onSelect, onUpdate, productId, productColor, rotation3d }) {
  const dragRef = useRef(null);
  const resizeRef = useRef(null);

  const onMouseMove = useCallback((e) => {
    if (dragRef.current) {
      const { id, startX, startY, origX, origY } = dragRef.current;
      onUpdate(id, { x: origX + e.clientX - startX, y: origY + e.clientY - startY });
    }
    if (resizeRef.current) {
      const { id, startX, startY, origSize } = resizeRef.current;
      const delta = (e.clientX - startX + e.clientY - startY) * 0.5;
      onUpdate(id, { size: Math.max(16, origSize + delta) });
    }
  }, [onUpdate]);

  const onMouseUp = useCallback(() => { dragRef.current = null; resizeRef.current = null; }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
    return () => { window.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove); window.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp); };
  }, [onMouseMove, onMouseUp]);

  const startDrag = (e, el) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    onSelect(el.id);
    dragRef.current = { id: el.id, startX: e.clientX, startY: e.clientY, origX: el.x, origY: el.y };
  };
  const startResize = (e, el) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    resizeRef.current = { id: el.id, startX: e.clientX, startY: e.clientY, origSize: el.size || 60 };
  };

  const pa = PRINT_AREAS[productId] || PRINT_AREAS.tshirt;

  return (
    <div
      onClick={() => onSelect(null)}
      style={{
        width: '100%', height: '100%', position: 'relative',
        userSelect: 'none', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
        background: 'radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 30%, #1e293b 0%, #0f172a 60%, #020617 100%)',
        overflow: 'hidden'
      }}
    >
      {/* Ambient light effects */}
      <div style={{ position:'absolute', inset:0, background:'radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 20%, rgba(99,102,241,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%)', pointerEvents:'none' }}/>
      <div style={{ position:'absolute', inset:0, background:'radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 80%, rgba(59,130,246,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%)', pointerEvents:'none' }}/>

      {/* Mockup + overlays */}
      <div style={{ position: 'relative', width: 340, height: 400, flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <Mockup3D productId={productId} color={productColor} rotation3d={rotation3d} />

        {/* Print area dashed border */}
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute', ...pa,
          border: '1.5px dashed rgba(99,179,237,0.5)',
          borderRadius: 6, pointerEvents: 'none', zIndex: 2,
          boxShadow: 'inset 0 0 20px rgba(99,179,237,0.05)',
        }}/>

        {/* Draggable elements */}
        {elements.map(el => (
          <div key={el.id} onMouseDown={e => startDrag(e, el)}
            style={{
              position: 'absolute', left: el.x, top: el.y, cursor: 'move', zIndex: el.zIndex || 3,
              transform: `rotate(${el.rotation || 0}deg) scaleX(${el.flipX ? -1 : 1})`,
              transformOrigin: 'center',
              outline: selectedId === el.id ? '2px solid #60a5fa' : 'none',
              outlineOffset: 4, borderRadius: 3, opacity: el.opacity ?? 1,
              mixBlendMode: el.blendMode || 'normal',
            }}
          >
            {el.type === 'text' && (
              <p style={{
                fontFamily: el.font || 'Bebas Neue', fontSize: el.size || 20,
                color: el.color || '#fff', fontWeight: el.bold ? 900 : 600,
                fontStyle: el.italic ? 'italic' : 'normal',
                textAlign: el.align || 'center', whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', margin: 0,
                lineHeight: 1.15, letterSpacing: el.letterSpacing || 0,
                textShadow: el.shadow ? '2px 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)' : 'none',
                WebkitTextStroke: el.stroke ? `1.5px ${el.strokeColor || '#000'}` : 'none',
              }}>{el.text}</p>
            )}
            {el.type === 'shape' && (
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width={el.size || 60} height={el.size || 60}
                style={{ display: 'block', overflow: 'visible', filter: el.shadow ? 'drop-shadow(2px 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.4))' : 'none' }}
                dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: el.svgContent }}
              />
            )}
            {el.type === 'sticker' && (
              <span style={{ fontSize: el.size || 40, lineHeight: 1, display: 'block', filter: el.shadow ? 'drop-shadow(2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.4))' : 'none' }}>{el.emoji}</span>
            )}
            {el.type === 'image' && (
              <img src={el.src} alt="" style={{ width: el.size || 80, height: el.size || 80, objectFit: 'contain', display: 'block' }} draggable={false} />
            )}
            {selectedId === el.id && (
              <div onMouseDown={e => startResize(e, el)}
                style={{ position: 'absolute', bottom: -6, right: -6, width: 14, height: 14, borderRadius: '50%', background: '#60a5fa', border: '2.5px solid white', cursor: 'se-resize', zIndex: 10, boxShadow: '0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)' }}
              />
            )}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

  const [italic, setItalic]           = useState(false);
  const [shadow, setShadow]           = useState(true);
  const [stroke, setStroke]           = useState(false);
  const [letterSpacing, setLetterSpacing] = useState(2);
  const [align, setAlign]             = useState('center');

  const fileRef = useRef();

  const handle3dMouseDown = (e) => {
    setIsDragging3d(true);
    drag3dRef.current = { startX: e.clientX, startRot: rotation3d };
    e.preventDefault();
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const onMove = (e) => {
      if (!isDragging3d || !drag3dRef.current) return;
      const delta = (e.clientX - drag3dRef.current.startX) * 0.4;
      setRotation3d(clamp(drag3dRef.current.startRot + delta, -35, 35));
    };
    const onUp = () => { setIsDragging3d(false); drag3dRef.current = null; };
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
    return () => { window.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove); window.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp); };
  }, [isDragging3d]);

  const updateElement = useCallback((id, patch) => {
    setElements(prev => prev.map(el => el.id === id ? { ...el, ...patch } : el));
  }, []);

  const addText = () => {
    const el = { id: uid(), type: 'text', text: textVal, font, size: fontSize, color: textColor, bold, italic, shadow, stroke, strokeColor: '#000', letterSpacing, align, x: 95, y: 120, zIndex: elements.length + 3 };

  };

  const addShape = (item) => {
    if (item.emoji) {
      const el = { id: uid(), type: 'sticker', emoji: item.emoji, size: 48, x: 100, y: 115, zIndex: elements.length + 3 };
      setElements(prev => [...prev, el]); setSelectedId(el.id);

      const svgContent = item.render(shapeColor);
      const el = { id: uid(), type: 'shape', svgContent, color: shapeColor, size: shapeSize, x: 100, y: 110, zIndex: elements.length + 3 };
      setElements(prev => [...prev, el]); setSelectedId(el.id);
    }
  };

  const handleImageUpload = (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = ev => {
      const el = { id: uid(), type: 'image', src: ev.target.result, size: 90, x: 95, y: 115, zIndex: elements.length + 3 };

'linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669)' : 'linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6)', color: 'white', border: 'none', fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700, cursor: 'pointer', boxShadow: `0 4px 20px ${added ?                     {ib(()=>setStroke(v=>!v),         "M12 20h9M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4L16.5 3.5z", stroke, 'Contour')}

              productId={product.id} productColor={productColor} rotation3d={rotation3d}
            />
            {/* Bottom HUD */}
            <div style={{ position: 'absolute', bottom: 12, left: '50%', transform: 'translateX(-50%)', display: 'flex', gap: 8, alignItems: 'center', pointerEvents: 'none' }}>
              <div style={{ background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)', color: '#94a3b8', backdropFilter: 'blur(12px)', padding: '5px 14px', borderRadius: 20, fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 600, whiteSpace: 'nowrap', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' }}>
                ← Glisser pour faire tourner → · Cliquez un élément pour éditer
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* Rotation indicator */}
            <div style={{ position: 'absolute', top: 12, right: 12, background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)', color: '#818cf8', backdropFilter: 'blur(8px)', padding: '4px 10px', borderRadius: 20, fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, border: '1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2)' }}>
              {Math.round(rotation3d)}°
              {rotation3d !== 0 && <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); reset3d(); }} style={{ marginLeft: 6, background: 'none', border: 'none', color: '#818cf8', cursor: 'pointer', fontSize: 10, padding: 0 }}>⟳</button>}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Print area label */}
          <div style={{ background: 'rgba(15,23,42,0.8)', borderRadius: 8, padding: '7px 14px', border: '1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.15)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, backdropFilter: 'blur(12px)' }}>
            <div style={{ width: 10, height: 10, border: '1.5px dashed rgba(99,179,237,0.6)', borderRadius: 2 }}/>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: '#64748b' }}>{(PRINT_AREAS[product.id]||PRINT_AREAS.tshirt).label} · Zone de personnalisation</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* ══════ DROITE ══════ */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 10 }}>
          {/* Layers */}
          <div style={S.card}>
            {shead(`Calques (${elements.length})`, '🗂️')}
            <div style={{ padding: '6px 8px', maxHeight: 200, overflowY: 'auto' }}>
              {elements.length === 0 ? (
                <p style={{ fontSize: 11, color: '#334155', textAlign: 'center', padding: '18px 0' }}>Aucun élément</p>
              ) : (
                [...elements].reverse().map(el => (
                  <div key={el.id} onClick={() => setSelectedId(el.id)}
                    style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, padding: '7px 8px', borderRadius: 8, cursor: 'pointer', background: selectedId===el.id?'rgba(99,102,241,0.1)':'transparent', border: `1px solid ${selectedId===el.id?'rgba(99,102,241,0.25)':'transparent'}`, marginBottom: 3, transition: 'all 0.12s' }}>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 15, flexShrink: 0 }}>{el.type==='text'?'T':el.type==='sticker'?el.emoji:el.type==='image'?'🖼':'◆'}</span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 11, flex: 1, color: '#64748b', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis', whiteSpace: 'nowrap' }}>{el.type==='text'?`"${el.text}"`:el.type==='sticker'?'Sticker':el.type==='shape'?'Forme':'Image'}</span>
                    <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); deleteEl(el.id); }} style={{ background: 'none', border: 'none', cursor: 'pointer', padding: 2, opacity: 0.35, color: '#94a3b8', fontSize: 12 }}>✕</button>
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Selected element properties */}
          {selectedEl && (
            <div style={S.card}>
              {shead('Propriétés', '⚙️')}
              <div style={{ padding: 12, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 12 }}>
                <div>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 5 }}>
                    <span style={S.label}>Opacité</span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 800, color: '#818cf8' }}>{Math.round((selectedEl.opacity??1)*100)}%</span>
                  </div>
                  <input type="range" min={0.05} max={1} step={0.05} value={selectedEl.opacity??1} onChange={e => updateElement(selectedId,{opacity:parseFloat(e.target.value)})} style={{ width: '100%', accentColor: '#6366f1' }}/>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 5 }}>
                    <span style={S.label}>Rotation</span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 800, color: '#818cf8' }}>{selectedEl.rotation||0}°</span>
                  </div>
                  <input type="range" min={0} max={360} step={5} value={selectedEl.rotation||0} onChange={e => updateElement(selectedId,{rotation:parseInt(e.target.value)})} style={{ width: '100%', accentColor: '#6366f1' }}/>
                </div>
                {selectedEl.type === 'shape' && (
                  <div>
                    <div style={{ ...S.label, marginBottom: 6 }}>Couleur de la forme</div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 5 }}>
                      {TEXT_COLORS.map(c => (
                        <button key={c} onClick={() => {
                          const item = Object.values(LIBRARY).flat().find(i => i.id && selectedEl.svgContent?.includes(i.id));
                          // update shape color by finding the lib item and re-rendering, or just change svgContent
                          const newSvg = selectedEl.svgContent ? selectedEl.svgContent.replace(/fill="[^"]*"/g, `fill="${c}"`).replace(/stroke="[^"]*"/g, `stroke="${c}"`) : '';
                          updateElement(selectedId, { color: c, svgContent: newSvg });
                        }}
                          style={{ width: 22, height: 22, borderRadius: '50%', background: c, padding: 0, border: selectedEl.color===c?'2.5px solid #6366f1':'2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', cursor: 'pointer', transform: selectedEl.color===c?'scale(1.28)':'scale(1)', transition: 'transform 0.12s', boxShadow: c==='#FFFFFF'?'inset 0 0 0 1px #666':'none' }} />
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                {selectedEl.type === 'text' && (
                  <div>
                    <div style={{ ...S.label, marginBottom: 6 }}>Couleur du texte</div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 5 }}>
                      {TEXT_COLORS.map(c => (
                        <button key={c} onClick={() => updateElement(selectedId,{color:c})} style={{ width: 22, height: 22, borderRadius: '50%', background: c, padding: 0, border: selectedEl.color===c?'2.5px solid #6366f1':'2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', cursor: 'pointer', transform: selectedEl.color===c?'scale(1.28)':'scale(1)', transition: 'transform 0.12s', boxShadow: c==='#FFFFFF'?'inset 0 0 0 1px #666':'none' }} />
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Order panel */}
          <div style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99,102,241,0.2), rgba(139,92,246,0.15))', borderRadius: 14, border: '1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.25)', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
            <div style={{ padding: 20, textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <p style={{ fontSize: 10, color: '#6366f1', marginBottom: 3, textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '0.1em', fontWeight: 700 }}>Prix estimé</p>
              <p style={{ fontSize: 34, fontWeight: 900, color: '#f1f5f9', marginBottom: 2, letterSpacing: '-0.03em' }}>{product.price.toLocaleString('fr-FR')}</p>
              <p style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#475569', marginBottom: 18 }}>FCFA · Taille {size}</p>
              <div style={{ background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)', borderRadius: 8, padding: '8px 10px', marginBottom: 14, border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)' }}>
                {[{ k: 'Produit', v: product.label }, { k: 'Couleur', v: COLORS.find(c=>c.hex===productColor)?.name || productColor }, { k: 'Taille', v: size }, { k: 'Éléments', v: `${elements.length} élément${elements.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}` }].map(({k,v}) => (
                  <div key={k} style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 3 }}>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: '#475569' }}>{k}</span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: '#94a3b8', fontWeight: 600 }}>{v}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              <button onClick={handleAddToCart}
                style={{ width: '100%', padding: '13px', background: added?'linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669)':'linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6)', color: 'white', border: 'none', borderRadius: 10, fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 14, cursor: 'pointer', boxShadow: `0 6px 22px ${added?'rgba(16,185,129,0.4)':'rgba(99,102,241,0.4)'}`, transition: 'all 0.3s', letterSpacing: '0.02em' }}>
                {added ? '✓ Ajouté !' : '🛒 Commander'}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Tips */}
          <div style={{ ...S.card, background: 'rgba(15,23,42,0.6)' }}>
            {shead('Guide', '💡')}
            <ul style={{ padding: '8px 14px 12px', listStyle: 'none', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 6 }}>
              {[
                ['←→', 'Glisser le canvas pour faire tourner le vêtement en 3D'],
                ['◉', 'Poignée bleue pour redimensionner l\'élément'],
                ['✦', 'Zone pointillée = zone d\'impression'],
                ['PRO', 'Badge doré = contenu premium'],
              ].map(([icon, tip]) => (
                <li key={icon} style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 8, fontSize: 11, color: '#475569', lineHeight: 1.6 }}>
                  <span style={{ color: '#6366f1', fontWeight: 800, flexShrink: 0, minWidth: 22, fontSize: 10 }}>{icon}</span>{tip}
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
